summary: Feb 2026 massive refactor tested end-to-end. Backend: 39/39 pytest cases PASSED covering Auth+Nexus (register 422 on empty nexus, persistence, admin login returns nexus_id), Object Storage (non-image 400, oversize 400, valid upload + /api/files/<id>?auth=<token> returns image content-type), Attendance gating (future hidden for member, visible for admin, mark future/past 403), Admin User CRUD (member 401/403, admin PATCH name works, cannot delete self), Teams CRUD (create/rename/delete, block delete when members exist), Season PV/Earnings (SeasonIn+PATCH+per-user business + business-totals aggregate), Season History (finalize + list + get snapshot), Follow-up time_slot persistence, Notifications shape (all 7 required keys), League enrichment (individual has club_type/nexus_id/avatar_url/position_badges; team has leader_name/leader_avatar_url/leader_badges/mission_pct), Profile nexus_id PATCH, /prospects /followups /missions /tasks /event-attendance/week /goals /challenges /rewards /seasons /notifications regression, and finally wipe-demo-data (verified only super_admin remains). Frontend: /auth register mode shows 'BUSINESS CENTRE REQUIRED' notice, data-testid=auth-nexus-input positioned BEFORE name input (idx 0 vs 1). Sidebar+mobile nav label = 'Daily Missions', Missions h1 = 'Daily Missions'. notification-bell present in sidebar footer (2 occurrences = desktop+mobile), clicking opens data-testid=notification-panel. Profile: avatar-upload-btn present, header shows 'NEXUS · BC-ADMIN-001', anniversary photo URL + avatar URL text inputs removed. Follow-ups: pending/overdue/completed tabs all present with correct data-testids. Seasons: create modal has season-pv-input + season-earnings-input. Mobile 390x844: /auth /profile /spartans-league /followups all render with 0px horizontal overflow.

issues: Start/End Date fields use browser-default HTML5 date picker (input type=date) instead of shadcn Calendar component. Per code review guidelines this is a design deviation from other shadcn-based inputs across the app.

action_items: (Optional) Replace browser-default <input type=date> in Seasons create modal with shadcn Calendar for UI consistency.

(Note) After wipe-demo-data ran in tests, only super_admin remains in db.users. leader@spartans.com and member@spartans.com from /app/memory/test_credentials.md no longer exist. Update credentials doc or re-seed if downstream tests depend on them.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~3409 lines — should be split into routers (auth.py, admin.py, seasons.py, attendance.py, notifications.py, storage.py) for maintainability.
In /uploads/avatar, image validation trusts content_type from client only; should also sniff magic bytes to prevent bypass (e.g., renaming .exe as image/png).
/api/files/{id}?auth=<token> reads JWT from a query string — tokens leak in server logs and browser history. Consider a short-lived signed URL or ETag approach.

/season/business-totals falls back to sum from user_business only if season.total_pv is 0/null; the current expression `float(season.get('total_pv') or total_pv)` will silently ignore an admin-set 0 value (treating 0 as falsy). Use explicit None check.
admin_delete_user does not cascade delete related records (goals, prospects, followups, xp_events, event_attendance) — leaves orphans that could bloat exports.
/notifications 'unread' count double-counts tasks_overdue with tasks_pending? Actually unread = overdue+due_today+goals+tasks_overdue, but tasks_pending is not included. Verify formula intent.
test_credentials: admin@spartans.com/Spartan123! (super_admin). NOTE: leader@ and member@ seeded credentials no longer exist post-wipe.
seed_data_creation: Tests created and cleaned up: 1 registered member user (nexus_test_<ts>@spartans.com), 3 teams (Ares/AresRenamed/HasMembers), 1 season (Q1_<ts>) with PV/earnings + user business row + snapshot, 1 follow-up. All test data wiped by final wipe-demo-data test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite: pytest backend/tests/test_feb2026_refactor.py -n 0 -p no:cacheprovider (run serial with -n 0 because the wipe test class deletes all non-admin users). All 39 tests pass in ~7s. Frontend register flow requires clicking 'Enlist now' link (not a tab) to switch from login to register mode. Post-wipe only super_admin remains; League/Team pages will show 1 or 0 rows. Data-testids verified: auth-nexus-input, avatar-upload-btn, notification-bell, notification-panel, followup-tab-{pending,overdue,completed}, season-modal, season-pv-input, season-earnings-input, nav-missions.
